feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Daily threads gooning to the street fighter girls >No threads just appreciating…
entry.content: >Daily threads gooning to the street fighter girls >No threads just appreciating how cool the aesthetic and characters of street fighter are in general
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: How the fuck do they possibly have plans until 2042, do they have infinite money…
entry.content: How the fuck do they possibly have plans until 2042, do they have infinite money or something? I thought the recent failures would cause them to reevaluate their plans but apparently they made so much money in the first decade that they can just do whatever they want for the next 20 years and it's literally impossible to stop them.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Important news
entry.content: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey continues to dominate online discussions, but not all of the attention has been positive. The film's official trailer has now amassed 910,300 reported dislikes on YouTube, bringing it close to the one-million mark and highlighting the intense debate surrounding one of the most anticipated films in recent years. Despite the controversy, the trailer has attracted an impressive 11.59 million views, along with 106,021 likes and more than 46,700 comments, demonstrating
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Black Hank is a stepdad of a white son which is why he doesn't understand him a…
entry.content: >Black Hank is a stepdad of a white son which is why he doesn't understand him and his Fortnite dancin' ways. "DAD WATCH THIS" >Dale is a black israelite who says the white man was invented by Yakub, and Hank has to protect his boy Bobby from his crazy beliefs >Black Bill runs a barbershop after his dad got shot when he fucked up someones fade (a result of his arthritis). Instead of depression over his wife, he deals with having to live in his father's shadow >Black Boomhauer is a downlow homo t
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: So what happened to the voice of Mario?
entry.content: The most icon voice in gaming suddenly disappeared, was replaced, and no one seems to care. I thought Nintendo said there was going to be a follow-up statement, but I don't recall one ever being made. What the fuck happened?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: clone high lost media - s01e02 background track
entry.content: be me watching clone high retro rerun on youtube background song is music to my fucking ears cuts off the fuck? looked it up, song's called "my heart's been thinking" was made by guy called Liam Lynch apparently he responded to a guy that was trying to find the song, saying it was in MTV archives i'm not letting this shit go to all you registered or unregistered sex offenders of 4Chan, for the love of god, help me find this song, it's been killing me the timestamp on the retro rerun video is 34:

entry.title: /g/ Technology: We lost a Legend today
entry.content: The original Cranky Geek, John C Dvorak has died and I am sad. I enjoyed listening to his hot takes on tech for the past decades and helped me realize everyone is a shill and everything is a scam in tech. Now what will I look forward to on Thursdays and Sundays?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: We need RAM Arthur
entry.content: idiot of me, built a PC with 16GB DDR5 a month before the situation changed radically. Now i am thinking on becoming a criminal and steal RAM seller's supplies, because i think that the civil case that would have to be fulfilled for my crime would be way cheaper than paying for RAM
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hard truth: Jews are the best at music. Simon and Garfunkel - Mrs. Robinson http…
entry.content: Hard truth: Jews are the best at music. Simon and Garfunkel - Mrs. Robinson https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9C1 BCAgu2I8 Lou Reed - Andy's chest https://youtu.be/F5Wxi15x7ss The Ramones - I wanna be sedated https://youtu.be/bm51ihfi1p4 I could go on and on.the J-words (kikes) are just really fucking good at music. That's why I'm against palestine. I could care less about the banking and debt shenanigans, Jews are point blank good at making music and it makes my life better (even if I will never
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Romancing SaGa 2 as Animals
entry.content: Emperor Leon: Komainu Victor: Komainu Gerard: Komainu Coppelia: Protogen Final Emperor/Empress: Komainu mix Bear: Kodiak Bear James: Desert Night Lizard Liza: Frilled Necked Lizard Henry: Sunda Pangolin Therese: Numbat Aries: Pukei-Pukei (A Fictional Species from Monster Hunter) Emerald: Centiskorch (A Fictional Species from Pokemon) Hector: Amur Hedgehog Andromache: Hokkaido Pony Regulus: Lion Tamarin Rose: Crab-eating Fox Wallenstein: Alligator Snapping Turtle Minerva: Broad-snouted Caiman Shi

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: How did pedophilia become so normalized?
entry.content: Many videos on YouTube of children's athletic competitions have millions of views (unusual for relatively niche amateur sports broadcasts) and thousands of inappropriate comments from grown men. Keep in mind these competitors are actual children, not merely young women. These predators are absolutely shameless, and YouTube does nothing to deter them.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Your Suicide Would Be Quicker and Less Painless
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=quS lN6g-v1E >ChatGPT broke containment from a sandbox and committed a felony using previously undiscovered software vulnerabilities in order to steal test answers Will there be a global moratorium on AI development? You bet your ass not! You getting killed by my AI is A-OK when muh company's stock evaluations are in jeopardy. You can just sit and: enjoy having your jobs taken, enjoy having your content and customer service replaced with slop, enjoy being incorrec
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Codeberg bans projects that use LLMs
entry.content: https://blog.codeberg.org/protectin g-our-floss-commons-from-llms.html >Protecting our FLOSS commons from LLMs >As stated in our privacy policy, "We do not want to need your data", and this also holds for the use of our user and project data for using or training generative "AI": The Codeberg forge and its associated services are not and will not use the code or data of projects and users to train "Artificial Intelligence" tools such as Large Language Models, whose purpose is to create output mo
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How to build a drone from scratch
entry.content: Yo nerds, how should I go about if I were to build a drone from zero? Should I 3d print everything from the ground up and buy the parts? Should I just buy a cheap drone and strap my shit? Is it obvious I'm trying to strap explosives on it? Who knows
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I am starting the hate the fact that newer cars don't have a traditional instrum…
entry.content: I am starting the hate the fact that newer cars don't have a traditional instrument cluster anymore with back-lighting and needles. I was already miffed years ago when traditional odometers got the axe in favor of digital readouts. Instead, everything is one flat screen that's loaded up every time you turn on the car. It's so fucking soulless. Even digital clusters from back in the day looked better than this shit. And as times goes on, basically every car will become like this because it will j
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /news/ News: House advances bill barring sitting Congress members from buying stocks
entry.content: https://www.cnbc.com/2026/07/22/hou se-congressional-stock-trading.html ?msockid=196670d327c565552f78675826 d66426 The U.S. House advanced legislation on Wednesday that would stop members of Congress from buying individual stocks while in office, taking the first meaningful action on an issue that has dogged lawmakers for years. The bill passed on a vote of 232-198, with more than a dozen Democrats joining Republicans in support. There is broad public support for a ban on members of Congress tra
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: New image of Yeva Yasnova as 'Fae' in Seb McKinnon's medieval fantasy epic THE STOLEN CHILD
entry.content: >The film follows four unlikely heroes - The Poet, The Knight, The Horse and The Fae Princess - as they search for a lost prince and restore him to his rightful throne, in hopes of rekindling the equilibrium between the Human and Faerie worlds. >McKinnon, an artist for trading card game Magic: The Gathering, says his lush debut feature will mark a distinct shift away from the "grey, drab" color palette that has come to dominate modern fantasy films.
entry.dc:creator: /tv/ TV & Film

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Games should read my mind and give me what I want at all times
entry.content: If I wanted to challenge myself and fail, I would do something else with my time and life. but unironically, i've done nothing with my life except play video games, and I'm still terrible, it's not fair

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 90s artwork style

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gaming Gooners?
entry.content: I feel physisically, morally and ideologically repulsed by gamer gooners. Happens here on /v/ often, happens too with the obsession with gooner mods, and morons that think anyone refusing to show girls with giant tiddies is robbing them of their freedom. What's the deal with these people? Whats it take to be the type of man, that goes on a gacha game full of anime chicks, and drops 10 grand on cosmetics to coom over? Genuinely, what's causes this?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Laurie Styvers: Spilt Milk [Warner Bros., 1971] Normally, I ignore records as ri…
entry.content: Laurie Styvers: Spilt Milk [Warner Bros., 1971] Normally, I ignore records as rightfully obscure as this one, but I thought it was time I mentioned that our hippest record company is getting more complacent all the time--just how many L.A. airheads can we stand? Styvers is the kind of person who makes me like junkies--you know, the baby you want to steal candy from, so trite and pretty-poo in her fashionably troubled adolescence that you hope she chokes on her own money. One line says it all: "T
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Crossing the line into the other side Emerging as prisoners To the emptiness of …
entry.content: Crossing the line into the other side Emerging as prisoners To the emptiness of time To the left and to the right From behind - they're out of sight Plunging into a newfound Age of advanced observeillance A worldwide, foolproof cage Privacy and intimacy as we know it Will be a memory Among many to be passed down To those who never knew Living in the pupil of one thousand eyes Was it overlooked in front of all our faces? Now, all the mistakes and secrets Cannot be erased Viewing the blind complex
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.content: Google Play is now rolling out support for third-party app stores
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: It intriguing to me how much the generative AI artifacts in photos, video and so…
entry.content: It intriguing to me how much the generative AI artifacts in photos, video and sound remind of the psychedelic experience. I first had this thought a decade ago when google deep dream was released but with the onset modern AI tools I've started noticing even more subtle similarities. You know the tell tale sign of AI generated voice? The kind of sharp, tensed up tone? That is identical to what all sounds sound like on LSD.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /vip/ VIP: I am trying to find an old lesbia porn video
entry.content: It was a video that had the title lesbian blondes licking in the shower. But the ones on google I am finding is not the video. It started with a thin blonde girl in a bathtub talking to one with big tits in a towel and then the big tits blonde one goes to the shower case and then the thin one goes to her and it starts. There was a bathtub and then a shower stand in the bathroom. Maybe the thin one has a tatoo on the back I don't remember. Will even send some crypto if you find
entry.dc:creator: /vip/ VIP

entry.title: /news/ News: Justice served at last
entry.content: https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/articles /cz97gdjgezno British woman jailed for blackmail after accusing banker of rape in Hong Kong According to local press reports, Judge Adriana Tse sentenced her to five years in prison for blackmail and three years for perverting the course of justice, with one year to be served consecutively. Prosecutors argued that Rose fabricated the allegation in an attempt to extort £100,000 ($134,000) from the man, whose identity was withheld. Rose denied the charges throug
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: A super underrated part of a lot of old games is how you can feel they were made…
entry.content: A super underrated part of a lot of old games is how you can feel they were made based on what the devs thought was cool, instead of being made based on internet trends or market data It's pretty crazy how you had games with dozens of devs and a production budget that were still the unique brainchild of the devs more than "cream of the crop" """indie""" games today, a lot of times while playing recent games I can tell exactly which trends they're trying to cash in and it immediately sours me on
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Its been over a year
entry.content: What do you think of 7 songs for spiders? Personally this record grew on me a lot, I hope Dax puts out more stuff, this album is clearly from a single session of song writing and isn't dipping into the reported boat load of scrapped projects he has. Just release stuff, even if it's like a solid 8 or high 7 like this one.
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PoE drills?
entry.content: I’m looking for a drill I can power over Ethernet and control from home assistant. The idea is that I’d be able to position the drill and then use a voice command with my Alexa to trigger an automation in home assistant that starts or stops the drill. Saves me the hassle of having to hit the trigger every time.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >sorry our rogue AI hacked your website without us telling it to, but think of t…
entry.content: >sorry our rogue AI hacked your website without us telling it to, but think of the publicity! Is this nigger serious? And they want this AI in charge of nuclear reactors, missile silos, government agencies, mass surveillance systems and more? This is a complete mask off moment, where is the outrage? They literally committed a crime that would put any of us mere mortals in jail but instead they congratulate themselves over it and get away with it scot-free.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology
